titleStmt.title: SII 6.561: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 561. (A.R. No. 125 of 1899). ON A PILLAR LYING IN THE FIELD OF HAMPANNA IN THE SAME VILLAGE. See Ep. Carn., Vol. XII, No. 28 Sira.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmānīśvaravaṁśajaḥ triṇa
yanaḥ kāṁcīpatiḻpallavaḥ (.) jā
taḥ tatkulajaḥ kirātanṛpa
tiṁ jitvā raṇē caṇḍikām Ā
rādhyārijayēna lōkavidi
tō nombādhirājōbhavat ka
¨rṇnāṭōnnutamaṁgaḷākhyanṛpa
ti¨rvvidvadbhirārādhitaḥ 1 © tatputra
ssiṁhapōta(ḥ)stadanumatasu
ta(ḥ)ścāruponnēranāma (.) tatpu
trā dhvastavairī narapatirabhavat
śrīpochalcōranombaḥ . 2 tatsū nu¨rbbhā
nutējā manujapatirabhūt lōka
rundrōmahēndraḥ . vidviṭbhūpāḷamau
ḷipraṇatapadayugaḥ kāmadhē
nūpamānaḥ 2 © tattanayō vidi
tanayō nanniganṛpatissukī¨rtti

rayyapadēvaḥ . tatsūnussūnṛtavā
gaṇniganṛpati¨rvvirājatē sma dha
raṇyāṁ4 © tadbhrātā raṇaraṁgē ji
tvārinṛpān® pratāpavān® dilī
paḥ bhūtalamavanvivēkī ma
numanuku¨rvvaṁ gu racayaḥ 5
© svasti samadhigatapa
ñcamahāśabda palla
vānvaya śrīprithuvīvalla
bha pallavakulatilakaṁ
pallavarāva palaroḍe
gaṇḍa Iṟivanoḻambanē
kavākya śrīmatdilīpa
rasar pṛthuvīrājyaṁge
yyuttuṁ sakanṛpakāḷā
kkrānta saṁvatsarasataṁga
ḷeṇṭunūṟaṟuvattanā
lkaneya sōbhakṛtsaṁva
tsaraṁ prava¨rttisuttire na

(na) nnēśvaradēva¨rgge piri
yabāṇageṟeyaṁ nu
ttarāyaṇasaṁkrāntiyo
ḷvakkāṇibhaṭārara siṣyar
cillukabhaṭārara kālaṁ ka
ḻci koṭṭa ma¨ryyādiyoḷa
ge nī¨rvvaḻkikīḻkere mūnū
ṟu gaṇḍugaṁ rājamānava
ṅkoṭṭaṁ . naḍado¨rkkaraṇasahi
tammaindayyanuṁ penjeṟuvi
na noḻambagāvuṇḍanuṁ kali
noḻambagāvuṇḍanuṁ sīya
vurada māṁgigāvuṇḍanuṁ mā
dhavagāvuṇḍanuṁ kōvarapi
ya ciṁpayyanuṁ lōkayyanuṁ
koṭṭārada mārapuliyuṁ gu
ṇḍayyanuṁ Intiva¨rnnaḍadar
sa¨rvvapādaparihāraṁ paḍe
dor cillukabhaṭārar ©
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō
harēttu vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭi
variṣasahāsrāṇi viṣṭā
yāṁ jāyatē krimi 6

sa¨rvvānētān bhāvinaṟpā¨rtthi
vēndrān bhūyō bhūyō yā
catē rāmabhadraḥ . sāmānyō
yaṁ dha¨rmmasētu[¨r*]nnṛpāṇāṁ
kālē kālē pālanīyō
bhavadbhiḥ 7 © haranarasaṁ su
ra¨rnneradaṁguṇḍu jaṭāvaḷi
toṁgalindradu¨rddharagirisē
tudha¨rmmagaḻeyaṁkada ma
ddaḷe dhūmavēḷe visphuri
tasivāgamaṁ surigeyā
gire pāpavanatti kutti niṣṭhu
ramiṟidintu kondatapadaṁkami
dītapadaṁkakārana8 © lakuḷīśō
nijanāmnō vismaraṇāśaṁkayē
va dha¨rmmāṇāṁ . punarapyavatī
¨rṇna bhuvi munināthaścellukō
jātaḥ 9 ©
Digital edition of SII 6.561 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
